text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I thought it'd be nice to eat at a cafe... but, it
turns out it's too crowded.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...How annoying. But I wasn't that hungry to begin
with, so I guess it's fine.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I could prepare something in the middle of the
night instead. Doesn't matter what it is, as long as
I get the proper nutrition—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ugh, no way! I put on more weight again!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Why oh why? I've even been avoiding ramen for
dinner.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I thought I was cutting back on the calories in my
snacks after dinner too!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
We have to eat right for breakfast, lunch, dinner,
and refrain from eating late at night... That's...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I want you to begin preparing my daily
meals, with healthy proportions to boot.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Make sure you're considering the proper times to
serve them, too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do as she says and begin preparing and
delivering meals to the laboratory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the proper diet, Agnes Tachyon seems
to feel more fit.
